'''dalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illocally|illocally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illocally|illocally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dalate|dalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dalatesher|dalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalatesherĂ«m|dalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dalatero|dalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dalateshĂ«|dalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalateshĂ«m|dalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidalatero|gokidalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidalateshĂ«|gokidalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalateshĂ«m|gokidalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godalankerom|godalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godalankeshĂ«|godalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godalankeshĂ«m|godalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godalankeya|godalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dalaterom|dalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalatemu|dalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dalateya|dalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidalaterom|gokidalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalatemu|gokidalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidalateya|gokidalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dalalate|dalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dalalatesher|dalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalalatesherĂ«m|dalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dalalatero|dalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dalalateshĂ«|dalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalalateshĂ«m|dalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidalalatero|gokidalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidalalateshĂ«|gokidalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalalateshĂ«m|gokidalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godalalankerom|godalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godalalankeshĂ«|godalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godalalankeshĂ«m|godalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godalalankeya|godalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dalalaterom|dalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalalatemu|dalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dalalateya|dalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidalalaterom|gokidalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalalatemu|gokidalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidalalateya|gokidalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠte|dĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠtesher|dĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠtero|dĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠtero|gokidĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠlĂŠnkerom|godĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠlĂŠnkeya|godĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠterom|dĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠtemu|dĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠteya|dĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠterom|gokidĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠlĂŠteya|gokidĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:daflafte|daflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:daflaftesher|daflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daflaftesherĂ«m|daflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daflaftero|daflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:daflafteshĂ«|daflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daflafteshĂ«m|daflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaflaftero|gokidaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidaflafteshĂ«|gokidaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaflafteshĂ«m|gokidaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godaflafnkerom|godaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godaflafnkeshĂ«|godaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godaflafnkeshĂ«m|godaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godaflafnkeya|godaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daflafterom|daflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daflaftemu|daflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:daflafteya|daflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaflafterom|gokidaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaflaftemu|gokidaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidaflafteya|gokidaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
